metadata.description: Nick's personal Claude Code skills collection

plugins.name: commit

plugins.description: Design effective Claude Code sub-agents following best practices

plugins.description: Show iOS Simulator or Android Emulator device logs

plugins.description: Remove signs of AI-generated writing from text

plugins.description: Generate a high-level specification summary for a Linear ticket

plugins.name: recommending-automation-approaches

plugins.name: review-claudemd
